AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    IMPORT dev.glossa.injector 0.1
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[8398044571386570029]]
        INSERT {
            BusyIndicator {
                id: glossaThinkingIndicator
                visible: GlossaInjector.thinking
                running: GlossaInjector.thinking
                anchors.horizontalCenter: parent.horizontalCenter
                anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
                anchors.bottomMargin: 100
                width: 60
                height: 60
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
